tasks.description: 1.1 Create migration to add new columns to leases table (signing_mode, tenant_signed_at, landlord_signed_at, signing_link_token_hash, signature_lock_version)
1.2 Create lease_signing_audit table with foreign key to leases
1.3 Add indexes on leases.signing_link_token_hash and lease_signing_audit.lease_id
1.4 Add CHECK constraint on leases.signing_mode to enforce 'in_person' or 'remote' values
1.5 Add CHECK constraint on leases.status to enforce valid status values
1.6 Backfill existing leases with signing_mode = 'in_person' and appropriate status
2.1 Create JWT utility functions for token generation with 30-day expiration
2.2 Implement SHA-256 token hashing function for secure storage
2.3 Create JWT verification utility with expiration checking
2.4 Implement token invalidation function for regeneration workflow
2.5 Add JWT secret to environment variables
3.1 Create SigningModeSelector component with in-person and remote options
3.2 Add signing mode state to wizard context/store
3.3 Implement mode selection validation (required before proceeding)
3.4 Add logic to lock mode selection after first signature
3.5 Style signing mode selector with Radix UI and Tailwind
3.6 Add visual indicators for selected mode
4.1 Create TenantSignaturePad component with signature_pad.js integration
4.2 Create LandlordSignaturePad component
4.3 Implement sequential enabling (tenant first, then landlord)
4.4 Add checkmark indicator after tenant signature capture
4.5 Implement lease terms display above signature areas
4.6 Add "Clear" and "Save" buttons for each signature pad
4.7 Implement signature conversion to base64 PNG data URL
4.8 Add validation to prevent empty signatures
5.1 Implement base64 validation utility
5.2 Add PNG format validation
5.3 Implement file size validation (<500KB threshold)
5.4 Add dimension validation (100x50 to 1000x500 pixels)
5.5 Implement signature data URL sanitization
5.6 Create API route for storing tenant signature with timestamp
5.7 Create API route for storing landlord signature with timestamp
5.8 Implement optimistic locking with signature_lock_version counter
5.9 Add retry logic with exponential backoff for failed saves
6.1 Create "Send Signing Link" button component
6.2 Add conditional rendering based on application draft status
6.3 Create API route for signing link generation
6.4 Implement JWT token creation with application_id and tenant_email
6.5 Create signing link URL with format `/tenant/sign-lease/[applicationId]?token=[jwt_token]`
6.6 Store token hash in leases.signing_link_token_hash
6.7 Add success/failure message display
6.8 Show copyable link in UI if email fails
7.1 Create Supabase Edge Function for email sending with Resend API
7.2 Design signing link email template with React Email
7.3 Include property details (name, unit, rent, deposit) in email
7.4 Add prominent "Review and Sign Lease" button with signing URL
7.5 Include landlord contact information in footer
7.6 Add expiration notice (30 days) in email body
7.7 Create landlord notification email template for tenant signature
7.8 Add email failure logging and fallback handling
8.1 Create /tenant/sign-lease/[applicationId] page route
8.2 Implement JWT token verification on page load
8.3 Add expired token error page with landlord contact info
8.4 Display complete lease terms (rent, deposit, dates, rules, amenities)
8.5 Create tenant signature capture interface
8.6 Implement scroll-to-bottom requirement before enabling signature
8.7 Add tenant signature save API route
8.8 Update lease status to "pending_landlord_signature" after save
8.9 Trigger landlord notification email after tenant signs
8.10 Display confirmation message to tenant after successful signing
9.1 Display tenant signature with timestamp in application view
9.2 Create "Countersign Lease" button (conditional on tenant signature)
9.3 Implement countersignature modal with signature pad
9.4 Create landlord countersignature API route
9.5 Update lease status to "active" after landlord signs
9.6 Send confirmation email to tenant with executed lease
9.7 Generate lease PDF with both signatures for email attachment
10.1 Create ToolAccessBar component with three buttons
10.2 Add "Contract Templates" button with link to /landlord/properties/[propertyId]/templates
10.3 Add "Property Policies" button with link to /landlord/properties/[propertyId]/policies
10.4 Add "Amenities" button with link to /landlord/properties/[propertyId]/amenities
10.5 Position buttons outside wizard modal in top navigation
10.6 Implement target="_blank" for new tab opening
10.7 Add icons to each button for visual clarity
11.1 Create localStorage utility functions (save, load, clear)
11.2 Implement wizard state serialization to localStorage
11.3 Add 24-hour TTL timestamp to stored state
11.4 Implement state restoration on wizard mount
11.5 Add stale data detection and discard logic
11.6 Clear localStorage on successful submission
11.7 Handle localStorage quota exceeded errors
11.8 Add warning banner for localStorage unavailable
11.9 Implement state versioning to invalidate on schema changes
12.1 Create lease status enum type (draft, pending_signature, pending_tenant_signature, pending_landlord_signature, active, expired, terminated)
12.2 Implement status transition validation function
12.3 Add server-side transition guards in API routes
12.4 Create status badge component with color coding
12.5 Add status display in lease details view
12.6 Implement status filtering in lease list queries
12.7 Add status change logging to audit trail
13.1 Create expired link error page component
13.2 Display expiration date and landlord contact on error
13.3 Implement "Request New Link" button with email to landlord
13.4 Create "Resend Signing Link" button in landlord application view
13.5 Implement link regeneration API route
13.6 Invalidate previous token when regenerating
13.7 Display link expiration date in landlord UI
13.8 Log link regeneration events to audit trail
14.1 Create audit logging utility function
14.2 Implement event logging for signing_link_generated
14.3 Implement event logging for signing_link_accessed
14.4 Implement event logging for tenant_signed
14.5 Implement event logging for landlord_signed
14.6 Implement event logging for signing_link_expired
14.7 Capture IP address and user agent for each event
14.8 Create audit trail display component
14.9 Add audit trail section to lease details view
14.10 Implement timestamp formatting (MMM DD, YYYY at HH:MM AM/PM)
14.11 Add authorization check for audit trail visibility
15.1 Implement window focus event listener in wizard
15.2 Trigger contract templates refetch on window focus
15.3 Trigger property policies refetch on window focus
15.4 Trigger amenities refetch on window focus
15.5 Add loading indicators during data refresh
15.6 Cache refetched data in wizard state
16.1 Add error boundary components for signing interfaces
16.2 Implement global error handling for signature operations
16.3 Add network error retry UI
16.4 Implement concurrent signing conflict resolution
16.5 Add validation error messages for all signature rules
16.6 Log all signature validation failures
16.7 Add Sentry error tracking for signing workflow
17.1 Write unit tests for JWT utility functions
17.2 Write unit tests for signature validation functions
17.3 Write unit tests for localStorage utilities
17.4 Write unit tests for lease status transitions
17.5 Write integration tests for in-person signing flow
17.6 Write integration tests for remote signing flow
17.7 Write integration tests for signing link regeneration
17.8 Write E2E tests for complete signing workflows
18.1 Update API documentation with new signing endpoints
18.2 Document lease status state machine
18.3 Create user guide for remote signing flow
18.4 Document email templates and customization
18.5 Update deployment checklist
18.6 Configure environment variables for production
18.7 Test deployment in staging environment
18.8 Deploy to production environment
18.9 Perform UAT with landlord test accounts
18.10 Enable feature flag for 10% canary deployment
18.11 Monitor error rates and gradually increase rollout
18.12 Complete 100% rollout after 90-day stability window

instruction:
Read context files, work through pending tasks, mark complete as you go.
Pause if you hit blockers or need clarification.
